requirement_topic.en: ERCA Customs Clearance — Import of Wireless / Telecom Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ERCA海关清关——无线电/电信设备进口
requirement_topic.zht: ERCA海關清關——無線電/電信設備進口

summary.en: All wireless and telecommunications terminal equipment imported into Ethiopia must clear customs through the Ethiopian Revenue and Customs Authority (ERCA). A valid ECA type approval certificate is required documentation for customs clearance of regulated telecom/radio equipment. Applicable import duties and taxes (including VAT) are assessed by ERCA at the time of import. PVOC (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity) is not currently a mandatory requirement for Ethiopia, but ESA may conduct inspections at customs for technical standard compliance. Ethiopia's HS code classification determines applicable duty rates; telecom equipment generally falls under HS Chapter 85.
summary.zh: 所有进口至埃塞俄比亚的无线电及电信终端设备须通过埃塞俄比亚税收与海关局（ERCA）完成清关。受监管的电信/无线电设备清关时，有效的ECA型式批准证书是必要文件。进口时，ERCA将评估适用的进口关税和税款（含增值税）。出口前合规验证（PVOC）目前并非埃塞俄比亚的强制要求，但ESA可能在海关对技术标准合规情况进行检查。埃塞俄比亚海关商品编码（HS编码）分类决定适用税率；电信设备一般归入HS第85章。
summary.zht: 所有進口至埃塞俄比亞的無線電及電信終端設備須通過埃塞俄比亞稅收與海關局（ERCA）完成清關。受監管的電信/無線電設備清關時，有效的ECA型式批准證書是必要文件。進口時，ERCA將評估適用的進口關稅和稅款（含增值稅）。出口前合規驗證（PVOC）目前並非埃塞俄比亞的強制要求，但ESA可能在海關對技術標準合規情況進行檢查。埃塞俄比亞海關商品編碼（HS編碼）分類決定適用稅率；電信設備一般歸入HS第85章。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Revenue and Customs Authority (ERCA) — import clearance regulations
Communications Service Proclamation No. 1148/2019 (Ethiopia) — ECA certificate required at customs
Ethiopian Customs Tariff Schedule — HS Chapter 85 (Electrical/Telecom Equipment)

summary.en: Chinese exports clear China Customs (GACC) on the export side with standard export declarations and, for regulated products, CCC certificates. On the China export side there is no direct equivalent of ERCA; customs obligations are handled by the importing country. Chinese manufacturers shipping to Ethiopia should ensure their export documents include the ECA type approval certificate number and that the local Ethiopian importer handles ERCA clearance.
summary.zh: 中国出口品在出口侧通过中国海关（GACC）以标准出口申报清关，对于受监管产品还需提交CCC证书。中方不存在与ERCA直接对应的机制；进口国负责海关义务。向埃塞俄比亚发货的中国制造商应确保出口文件包含ECA型式批准证书编号，并由埃塞俄比亚本地进口商负责ERCA清关。
summary.zht: 中國出口品在出口側通過中國海關（GACC）以標準出口申報清關，對於受監管產品還需提交CCC證書。中方不存在與ERCA直接對應的機制；進口國負責海關義務。向埃塞俄比亞發貨的中國製造商應確保出口文件包含ECA型式批准證書編號，並由埃塞俄比亞本地進口商負責ERCA清關。

standards_or_laws: GACC (General Administration of Customs, China) — export customs declaration (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — required on export declaration for regulated products (China)

gap.en: ERCA customs clearance requires a valid ECA type approval certificate for regulated telecom/radio devices. PVOC is not currently mandatory for Ethiopia (unlike Kenya or some West African markets), but ESA inspections at customs are possible. Chinese exporters must ensure their Ethiopian importer holds the ECA certificate before shipping. Import duties under HS Chapter 85 apply and must be factored into landed cost.
gap.zh: ERCA海关清关要求受监管的电信/无线电设备持有有效的ECA型式批准证书。PVOC目前在埃塞俄比亚不是强制要求（与肯尼亚或部分西非市场不同），但ESA可能在海关进行检查。中国出口商须确保其埃塞俄比亚进口商在发货前持有ECA证书。HS第85章下的进口关税适用，须纳入到岸成本测算。
gap.zht: ERCA海關清關要求受監管的電信/無線電設備持有有效的ECA型式批准證書。PVOC目前在埃塞俄比亞不是強制要求（與肯尼亞或部分西非市場不同），但ESA可能在海關進行檢查。中國出口商須確保其埃塞俄比亞進口商在發貨前持有ECA證書。HS第85章下的進口關稅適用，須納入到岸成本測算。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ERCA customs clearance is mandatory for all wireless and telecom equipment imported into Ethiopia. A valid ECA type approval certificate must be available at the time of customs clearance for regulated devices. PVOC is not currently mandatory for Ethiopia, but ESA inspections at customs are possible. Import duties under HS Chapter 85 apply. Verify current ERCA tariff schedules and clearance requirements with a qualified Ethiopian customs agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ERCA海关清关对于所有进口至埃塞俄比亚的无线电及电信设备均属强制要求。受监管设备在清关时须持有有效的ECA型式批准证书。PVOC目前在埃塞俄比亚不是强制要求，但ESA可能在海关进行检查。HS第85章进口关税适用。请与合格的埃塞俄比亚海关代理核验现行ERCA税则和清关要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ERCA海關清關對於所有進口至埃塞俄比亞的無線電及電信設備均屬強制要求。受監管設備在清關時須持有有效的ECA型式批准證書。PVOC目前在埃塞俄比亞不是強制要求，但ESA可能在海關進行檢查。HS第85章進口關稅適用。請與合格的埃塞俄比亞海關代理核驗現行ERCA稅則和清關要求。
